title: Unable to access interface instance through cocotb vpi
body:
### Issue

Can't access interface instance through latest verilator+cocotb vpi. It was possible earlier on https://github.com/antmicro/cocotb-verilator-build

### HDL
```systemverilog
interface Bus;
    logic [7:0] a;
    logic b [7:0];

    modport src (output a, input b);
    modport snk (input a, output b);
endinterface

module t(
    input i_clk
);

    Bus b1();

endmodule
```

### Cocotb testbench
```python
import cocotb
from cocotb.triggers import Timer

@cocotb.test(skip=False)
def basic_test(dut):
    v = dut.b1.a
    yield Timer(10)
```

### Error
```
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:341  in embed_sim_init                  Python interpreter initialized and cocotb loaded!
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:138  in _initialise_testbench           Running tests with cocotb v1.3.0 from /home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:155  in _initialise_testbench           Seeding Python random module with 1578975413
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:190  in initialise                      Found test test.basic_test
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:348  in execute                         Running test 1/1: basic_test
     0.00ns INFO     ..tb.test.basic_test.0x7fa8e8369890       decorators.py:253  in _advance                        Starting test: "basic_test"
                                                                                                                     Description: None
     0.00ns ERROR    cocotb.regression                         regression.py:327  in handle_result                   Test Failed: basic_test (result was AttributeError)
                                                                                                                     Traceback (most recent call last):
                                                                                                                       File "/home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/sv_interface_test/tests/test.py", line 6, in basic_test
                                                                                                                         v = dut.b1.a
                                                                                                                       File "/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/handle.py", line 285, in __getattr__
                                                                                                                         raise AttributeError("%s contains no object named %s" % (self._name, name))
                                                                                                                     AttributeError: t contains no object named b1
     0.00ns ERROR    cocotb.regression                         regression.py:210  in tear_down                       Failed 1 out of 1 tests (0 skipped)
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:400  in _log_test_summary               *************************************************************************
                                                                                                                     ** TEST             PASS/FAIL  SIM TIME(NS)  REAL TIME(S)  RATIO(NS/S) **
                                                                                                                     *************************************************************************
                                                                                                                     ** test.basic_test    FAIL            0.00          0.00         6.70  **
                                                                                                                     *************************************************************************

```
### Test
[sv_interface_test.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/4057298/sv_interface_test.tar.gz)
